judge_thought:
Explanation:
Interpreting the question in the context of individual matches (i.e., which China player scored more than 3 goals in any single game), the table shows that in each listed match, no player is credited with more than one goal, and no match has any player scoring more than three. The “china scorers” column never lists the same player more than once in a single row, confirming that no player exceeded three goals in any match. Therefore, the correct response is that no player meets this criterion, which aligns with the Prediction Answer: null.
